Providing exceptional guest services and experiences is what motivated me to embark on a hospitality management career. Over the years I have learned that hands-on leadership to motivate high performing teams that exceed guest expectations ensures targets and strategic objectives are met that leads to enhanced brand loyalty and financial performance. Taking a 360-degree approach to management, I have a unique understanding of the intricacies of interdepartmental collaboration and stakeholder engagement that includes owners and can confidently manage across cultures. Being proactive, highly detail oriented and results driven has enabled me to transform underperforming properties and deliver successful pre-opening of new establishments, drilling down to identify areas of improvement, not just in systems and processes but also the physical structure of the premises to ensure product and service offerings are optimised. I specialise in identifying revenue generating opportunities combining business acumen with exceptional guest services to develop business, generate revenue and maximise profits. Please feel free to contact me here on LinkedIn. I look forward to connecting with you!

experience.title: General Manager - Amari Johor Bahru
experience.description: Spearheaded management team (11) in restructuring and reorganisation, overseeing 137 total headcount in post-pandemic business plan formulation and execution. Core responsibilities: - Procedures Implementation - Creative Solutions Development - Performance Management - KPIs - Continuous Improvement Policies - Daily Operations - Reward and Recognition Initiatives - Coaching - Team Motivation - Employee Engagement - Service Excellence - Service Standards Quality - Guest Satisfaction - Stakeholder Engagement - Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR) - Business Partnership Development - Vendor Management - Owner Relationship Management - Management Company Engagement - Local Government Authorities Liaison - Regulatory Compliance - Licensing - Good Governance - Property Maintenance - New Business Promotions - External Catering Business Achievements: - Restored property to 5-star standard within 6 months including chiller repairs completion, new CCTV implementation and Halal Certificate accreditation from JAKIM. - Increased 2022 Average Daily Rate (ADR) by RM 80.00 (32%) leading to 2nd position out of 6 in ADR and 3rd out of 6 in RevPAR. - Delivered 50% increase in 2022 YTD Hotel Revenue at RM 26.774M vs. RM17.89M budget - Generated 64% increase in 2022 YTD Gross Operating Profit (GOP) at RM 6.3M vs. RM 3.85M million budget. - 2023 YTD Revenue currently exceeds budget by RM 887.3K (22%) with GOP also above budget by RM 40K (5%).

experience.title: General Manager - Suasana Iskandar Malaysia Medini Iskandar Malaysia
experience.description: Oversee residential development - Suasana Iskandar Malaysia - comprising a 35-storey serviced apartment, Amari's 1st Malaysian hotel and Zenith Lifestyle Centre complete with international and specialty F&B, entertainment and wellness, alongside Medini Iskandar Malaysia - an integrated development including UMCity (mixed-use commercial) and Virdea Lakeside (green residential). Core responsibilities: - Operations Management - Facilities Management - Property Management

experience.title: General Manager - Grand Copthorne Waterfront Singapore
experience.description: Spearhead comprehensive daily hotel operations service delivery covering front office (guest relations, front desk), housekeeping, engineering and maintenance, revenue management, sales & marketing and MICE to deliver exceptional guest experiences. Define overall hotel strategy and ensure team performance via heads of department with training and development programs to ensure service quality and standards with employee of the month reward schemes and recognition. Ensure conformity with industry standards and regulatory requirements including health and safety, identify and collaborate with internal and external parties on structural repairs and maintenance. Oversee sales & marketing promotions and incentives to drive brand awareness, loyalty and repeat business. Core Responsibilities: - Operations Management - Strategy Development - Training and Development - Employee Recognition Programs - Regulatory Compliance - Collaboration with internal and external stakeholders - Sales & Marketing Direction Achievements: • Oct 2023 – Total revenue SGD7.532M above budget by SGD1.2M with highest total revenue since 2014 and highest out of 6 Singapore properties. GOP SGD3.348M (44.5% margin) above budget by SGD1.06M with GOP almost 45% at SGD3.3M from SGD7.5M total revenue. MICE revenue at SGD2.47M highest since 2017. • Sep 2023 - Total revenue SGD6.5M, SGD384K above budget and highest total revenue since 2019, GOP SGD3.039M (at 47% margin), above budget at SGD862.1K. SGD6.5M revenue and SGD3M GOP – almost 50% representing extremely high profit margin. Highest recorded ADR at SGD285 since 2014. • Aug 2023 - Total revenue closed at SGD5.9M (rooms SGD3.6M, F&B SGD1.7M), above budget by SGD1M, Aug GOP above budget by SGD900K. • July 2023 - Highest recorded room revenue and RevPAR since 2015 despite 60 rooms out of order for 7 days. Hotel revenue SGD1.35M above budget. July GOP above budget by SGD988K.

linkedin_profile.headline: Cluster Marketing Communications Manager at JW Marriott Singapore South Beach and The St. Regis Singapore
linkedin_profile.about:
Passionate marketer and keen communicator with demostrated experience in the marketing and hospitality industry. Skilled in Marketing, Event Planning, Social Media, Advertising, Partnerships, Creative Thinking, Public Relations, Campaign Management, Project Management and Content Creation.

Total Experience: 12 years and 6 months

experience.title: Marketing Branding Executive
experience.description: Coordinate and manage overall marketing & branding efforts. Coordinate and manage all advertising & promotion requirements. Plan and execute marketing activities and campaigns. Formulate and implement marketing collaterals and materials. Keep abreast of market development trends and product innovation. Bring in new ideas and perspectives.

experience.title: Marketing Executive
experience.description: Grow the brand presence through Social Media platforms. Liaising with media publications on advertising and sourcing for advertising opportunities. Support to implement, coordinate and execute marketing campaigns. Work closely with graphic designers to ensure compliance of marketing assets comply to brand guideline. Monitoring marketing budget Sponsorship of media personalities and bloggers

experience.title: Marketing And Communications Executive
experience.description: -Manage in-house graphic designer and work closely with E-marketing Manager to implement marketing communications programs and activities that are defined and agreed upon by the Group Marketing Communications Manager -Assist in the conceptualizing, development and execution of marketing collaterals, both online and print -Plan, coordinate and execute campaigns and tasks for branding, promotions, advertising, social media, email direct marketing and loyalty programs. -Responsible for content creation for online and offline marketing collaterals -Responsible for assisting with managing the review cycle of web content and interfacing with the E-Marketing Manager -Develop a strong working relationship with vendors like printer, production house, signage vendors that facilitate quick work turnaround -Build strong rapport with media reporters, editors and writers on local media platform to assure extensive media coverage -Write press release, speeches, letters and develop copy works on all marketing collaterals -Responsible for ensuring that Marketing Communications project are executed on time whilst meeting the Furama’s CI standards -Work very closely with the E-Marketing Manager to ensure that e-collaterals are distributed appropriately and effectively to the stipulated database -To work closely with E-Marketing Manager to generate useful email leads and manage useful customer / guests database -Act as gatekeeper to ensure job requisitions from other departments are channeled appropriately and deliverables meeting the deadlines set. -Managing all social media platforms -Responsible for managing annual budget -Organize PR events, and take charge of communications and related activities -Brand coordination to ensure consistency within Furama group and brand is accurately represented on all communication material

experience.title: Assistant Marketing Communications Country Manager
experience.description: Marketing Strategy. Branding Management. Event Management. Content Curation. Public Relations. Partnerships. Team Management. Creative Thinking.
